Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Vallenar Corporation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — The Vallenar Corporation employees wear silver-and-blue uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Vallenar Corporation personnel secured a section of the Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Varic Vallenar is the former heir to the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The Vallenar Corporation is a corporate entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Varic Vallenar is associated with the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Varic Vallenar is a Professor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The protagonist has a connection to the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The narrator blacklists requests from the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Vallenar Corporation uses a logo consisting of a merging V and A resembling a stylized bird of prey.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Vallenar Corporation produces high-quality processors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Vallenar Corporation would intercept requests for the narrator's identity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Vallenar Corporation owns the proprietary spell Mirror of Silence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 20''' — Benri Vallenar has a magic-born clone working at Vallenar Corporation headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The Vallenar Corporation is a corporation the Captain has had good relations with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — The Vallenar Corporation is a place or entity Professor Vallenar wishes to be far from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — The Vallenar Corporation specializes in the Sunsail line of ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Vallenar Corporation has guards that are highly trained and well-equipped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Vallenar Corporation has hired Omega in every memory of the protagonist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — The Vallenar Corporation is a company the narrator might seek help from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — The Vallenar Corporation has ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — The Vallenar Corporation has a presence in colonies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — A loss of ships or currency could devastate the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The Vallenar Corporation can procure rare goods in exchange for favors from The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Vallenar Corporation is an entity that Nelthan risks damaging relations with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Vallenar Corporation is an organization that provides assistance via a woman on the line.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — Omega has worked against the Vallenar Corporation.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — The Vallenar Corporation has a large presence on Dornoth IV.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — The Vallenar Corporation was founded by Varic Vallenar's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The Vallenar Corporation is associated with the Mirror of Silence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — The Vallenar Corporation funded the Starhammer movie series.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 27''' — The Vallenar Corporation is a company the Captain previously worked for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Vallenar Corporation has made several offers to the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Varic Vallenar has a complicated relationship with the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Varic Vallenar abandoned the Vallenar Corporation.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 6''' — The Vallenar Corporation is the parent company of Cablewright Genetics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Vallenar Corporation is an entity the narrator considers running information by.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — The Vallenar Corporation has outposts in the Beshkin system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Vallenar Corporation has employees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — The Vallenar Corporation is an entity the narrator's group might owe favors to.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Vallenar Corporation has a planetary headquarters on Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — The Vallenar Corporation is a company that Nila was promised a position in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — The Vallenar Corporation possesses a heavily armed warship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The Vallenar Corporation has security measures that pale to those of Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The Vallenar Corporation is a corporate entity whose involvement in war would devastate the galactic economy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — The Vallenar Corporation has a scout team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — A Vallenar Corporation ship was led to the Dornoth system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Vallenar Corporation has assets on Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Benri is the president of the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Vallenar Corporation is an entity that the crew of The Last Horizon has made enemies with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Vallenar Corporation is an organization Benri Vallenar can turn resources against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Nila wears a Vallenar Corporation uniform.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
